license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kzzcx76
title: Removal of genomic DNA from RNA preparations (Thermo Scientific )
author: Maximilian Dietsch

steps_raw.instruction: %s %s Add to an RNase free tube: RNA 1 µg 10X reaction buffer with MgCl2 1 µl DNase I, RNase-free 1 µl (1U) Water to 10 µl
Add EDTA, Water and PCI and vortex thoroughly. undetermined, EDTA undetermined, Water undetermined, PCI (phenol chloroform isoamyl alcohol)
Centrifuge for 10 min at 10000 rpm and 4 °C
transfer the upper phase into a fresh tube and add 3 volumen EtOH/ 3M Natrumacetat (30:1, ph 5.2 )
Centrifuge 30 min at 13000 rpm and 4 ° C Undetermined 00:30:00
Discard supernatant and wash pellet with 75% EtOH ( do not resuspend the pellet)
Centrifuge 10 min at 13000 rpm and 4 °C Undetermined 00:10:00
go to step #8 go to step #9
Discard supernatant and dry pellet for 10 - 15 min
